interpretation: Southern Abrasives moved to won in Linear, creating both operational handoff needs and a possible marketing proof-point opportunity.

state_patch.summary: Southern Abrasives moved to won in Linear, creating an operational handoff and a possible marketing proof-point opportunity, but public naming and external announcement permission remain unresolved.
open_questions: Can Southern Abrasives be named publicly?
Which delivery or onboarding follow-up is required?

Laura should review whether the won deal supports an internal proof-point note, customer story draft, LinkedIn draft, or no-op.
